caption: The video provides a close-up view of a vehicle's instrument cluster from the driver's perspective. The dashboard displays several gauges and indicators, including a digital screen and analog dials. Legible text on the dashboard includes "UNLEADED FUEL ONLY" and a red warning light that reads "DOOR AJAR." A key is inserted into the ignition switch, and a portion of the steering wheel is visible in the foreground, partially obstructing the view of the gauges. As the sequence progresses, the camera shifts slightly, changing the angle of the shot and the way light reflects off the dashboard's clear plastic cover. No people are visible in the frames, and the interior components of the car remain stationary while the perspective subtly moves.
